messages.message: Unable to check if https://nhicore.nhi.gov.tw/pas/ValueSet/nhi-medication-fda is a proper subset of https://twcore.mohw.gov.tw/ig/twcore/ValueSet/medication-fda-tw - value set is too large to check
The slice definition for MedicationRequest.medication[x]:medicationCodeableConcept.coding has a maximum of 1 but the slices add up to a maximum of 2. Check that this is what is intended
